bird.name: Rusty-backed monjita
bird.summary: The rusty-backed monjita (Neoxolmis rubetra) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is endemic to Argent…

locations.name: 图库曼省
locations.summary: 圖庫曼省（西班牙語：Provincia de Tucumán）位於南美洲國家阿根廷北部，是該國的23個行省之一，首府為聖米格爾-德圖庫曼（San Miguel de Tucumán）。當地人暱稱其作「Tucumano」。 另見 图库曼议会…

locations.name: 恩特雷里奥斯省
locations.summary: 恩特雷里奥斯省（西班牙語：Entre Ríos，意思是「兩河之間」）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一省，位於阿根廷東北部，該省首府為巴拉那市。其他主要城市還有康科迪亚等。 参考文献

locations.name: 圣克鲁斯省 (阿根廷)
locations.summary: 圣克鲁斯省（西班牙語：Provincia de Santa Cruz）為阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷南部，首府為里奥加耶戈斯。 聖克魯斯省下共劃分為七個區域，分別為： 科爾彭艾克縣（首府Puerto Santa Cruz） 德塞阿多縣…

relations.subject: Rusty-backed monjita
relations.evidence: | last2=Rumboll |first2=Maurice| title =Birds of Southern South America and Antarctica | publisher =Princeton University Press | series =Princeton Illustrated Checklists | date =2001 | location =New Jersey | pages =Plate 75, map 75.7 | isbn =0-691-09035-1 }} In addition, it has been recorded as a vagrant in extreme southern Brazil and in Chile. The species inhabits grasslands and steppe with scattered small bushes; it sometimes is found along the shores of lakes
